title: Verify replay-safe classification apply
preconditions: A public LEDGER test contract supports assignment, correction, idempotent replay, stable rejection, and injected interruption around every call and durability boundary.
steps: Apply current uncategorized suggestions; apply one explicit reasoned correction; attempt broad correction; exercise stale preflight; replay identical and conflicting requests; interrupt and resume between items.
expected: FR-CLASSIFY-APPLY-EXECUTION holds: preflight is all-or-none, each item reaches one exact status, corrections stay individual, retries create no second allocation, and resume starts from the durable unresolved frontier.
